Bash(STAR_OFFICE_URL="http://127.0.0.1:19000" STAR_OFFICE_JOIN_KEY="ocj_example_team_01" python scripts/ai-office-bridge.py claude-code writing "正在和主人對話中")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CommandLine | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 19000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess, LocalPort, State")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 19000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host ''All killed''")

Bash(powershell -Command "$conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 19000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { $pid = $c.OwningProcess; if \($pid -gt 0\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ""Killed PID $pid"" } }; Write-Host ''Done''")

Bash(python -c "import subprocess; r=subprocess.run\([''powershell'',''-Command'',''Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 19000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess''],capture_output=True,text=True\); pids=r.stdout.strip\(\).split\(\); [subprocess.run\([''taskkill'',''/F'',''/PID'',p]\) for p in pids if p.isdigit\(\) and int\(p\)>0]; print\(''killed:'',pids\)")
Bash(python -c "import time; time.sleep\(4\); import urllib.request; r=urllib.request.urlopen\(''http://127.0.0.1:19000/health''\); print\(r.read\(\).decode\(\)\)")
